description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular frame. The grip features a diamond-patterned texture, likely for enhanced handling, and appears to be made of a polymer or composite material. The slide is solid and unadorned, with minimal visible markings, and the barrel is recessed within the slide, showing a standard round muzzle. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile. Overall, the handgun has a utilitarian and modern design, suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured grip and a streamlined, modern design. The frame is angular, and the magazine base is flush with the grip.
description_view_0: The left side of the handgun shows the full profile, highlighting the diamond-patterned grip and the smooth, unmarked slide.
description_view_1: The rear view displays the width of the grip and slide, as well as the alignment of the sights and the back of the hammer area.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, with the grip texture and slide profile clearly visible, and the trigger guard's curvature apparent.
description_view_3: The front view reveals the round muzzle opening, the thickness of the slide, and the front sight post.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and features a diamond-patterned texture for improved traction. It appears to be constructed from a dark polymer material, providing both durability and comfort. The surface is matte, with no visible logos or embellishments, and the pattern covers the majority of the grip area, enhancing control during use. The backstrap and frontstrap are smoothly integrated, and there are no finger grooves or additional decorative elements.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, offering a traditional profile with a smooth, continuous curve. It is generously sized to accommodate gloved fingers and lacks any undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessory rails. The surface is consistent with the rest of the frame, with no visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a simple and functional appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, recessed within the slide, and has a round muzzle opening. There are no visible external features such as threading, porting, or compensators. The exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide, and no markings or fluting are apparent on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and unobtrusive profile. There are no extensions, flares, finger rests, logos, or texturing visible on the magazine base, contributing to the handgun's minimalist design.
